testcase.name: test_admin_pin_status_returns_200
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_37.py:39: in test_admin_pin_status_returns_200 assert res.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {res.status_code}: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_pin_status_configured_field

failure.message: AssertionError: 'configured' key missing in response: {'detail': 'Invalid token'} assert 'configured' in {'detail': 'Invalid token'}

testcase.name: test_admin_pin_status_is_configured
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_37.py:52: in test_admin_pin_status_is_configured assert data["configured"] is True, f"Expected configured=True (PIN 1234 should be set), got: {data}" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'configured'

testcase.name: test_set_admin_pin_returns_200
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_37.py:57: in test_set_admin_pin_returns_200 assert res.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {res.status_code}: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_set_admin_pin_success_message

failure.message: AssertionError: No 'message' in response: {'detail': 'Invalid token'} assert 'message' in {'detail': 'Invalid token'}

testcase.name: test_set_admin_pin_too_short_returns_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_37.py:68: in test_set_admin_pin_too_short_returns_400 assert res.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for short PIN, got {res.status_code}: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for short PIN, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 400 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_pin_status_after_set
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_37.py:75: in test_admin_pin_status_after_set assert data["configured"] is True, f"Expected configured=True after set, got: {data}" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'configured'

testcase.name: test_update_admin_pin
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_37.py:87: in test_update_admin_pin assert res.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_users_returns_list
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_37.py:106: in test_get_users_returns_list assert res.status_code == 200, f"Got {res.status_code}: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_user_has_id_field

failure.message: AssertionError: User missing 'id': detail assert 'id' in 'detail'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_37.py:116: in test_user_has_id_field assert "id" in u, f"User missing 'id': {u}" E AssertionError: User missing 'id': detail E assert 'id' in 'detail'

testcase.name: test_set_auditor_access
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_37.py:123: in test_set_auditor_access target = next((u for u in users if u.get("username") != "owner"), None) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_new_features_37.py:123: in <genexpr> target = next((u for u in users if u.get("username") != "owner"), None) ^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'

testcase.name: test_create_po_cash_type
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_37.py:162: in test_create_po_cash_type branch_id, product = self._get_branch_and_product(authed) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_new_features_37.py:154: in _get_branch_and_product branch_id = branches[0]["id"] if branches else None ^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 0
